reports.title: Reports
reports.noCompany: Select an active company to see the reports.

reports.subtitle_other: VAT summary · journals · accounting exports · archive — {{count}} invoices issued in {{month}} {{year}}
reports.truncated: Showing the first {{shown}} of {{total}} invoices — narrow the filters to see all records.

cards.salesJournalDesc: All invoices issued in the period, broken down by VAT rate — CSV export
cards.purchaseJournalDesc: Received invoices with deductible VAT, only documents with a complete breakdown
cards.vatSummaryDesc: Base and VAT for each rate and category (S/AE/E/Z), for the selected period
cards.accountingDesc: Accounting entries and partners for import into another accounting software
cards.xlsxDesc: Invoices with net, VAT and total in a spreadsheet, ready to pivot
cards.archiveDesc: All e-Invoices with the ANAF-signed receipts, organized by month — ZIP

vatTable.title: VAT collected by rate — {{month}} {{year}}
vatTable.empty: No validated invoice in the selected period.

integrity.title: Archive integrity check
integrity.missingHint: they can be re-downloaded from SPV (if under 60 days old) or restored from backup
integrity.underRetentionDesc1: Missing documents still within the legal retention period of
integrity.retentionDesc2: from the end of the financial year (L82/1991)

notify.vatExportFailed: Could not export the VAT report.
notify.salesJournalFailed: Could not export the sales journal.
notify.purchaseJournalFailed: Could not export the purchase journal.
notify.reparseFailed: Could not recompute VAT from XML.

saft.infoTitle: D406 — SAF-T (Standard Audit File for Tax)
saft.infoText: The standard audit file for tax (SAF-T) contains the detailed accounting data requested by ANAF: accounts, journals, invoices, stock and assets. Starting with 2025, filing D406 monthly is mandatory for medium and large taxpayers.
saft.banner: For small companies, the D406 filing deadline has been postponed. Check your company's specific obligation.
saft.officialTitle: Official ANAF D406 export (full schema + GL) for {{period}}
saft.previewXmlTitle: View and edit the official D406 XML for {{period}} (with DUK re-validation)

notify.officialSavedNoDuk: Official D406 saved: {{path}} (DUK validation unavailable locally)
notify.exportOfficialFailed: Could not export the official D406.
notify.previewFailed: Could not generate the D406 XML for preview.

salesJournal.title: Sales journal
salesJournal.empty: No invoice issued in the selected period.

purchaseJournal.title: Purchase journal
purchaseJournal.unparsedBanner: For some received invoices, VAT has not yet been extracted from the XML. Press “Recompute VAT from XML” for complete reporting.

saga.title: SAGA export
saga.desc2: Generates a CSV file with the period's accounting entries. The file includes all invoice lines with VAT breakdown.

winmentor.title: WinMentor export
winmentor.desc2: for import into the main accounting system. The columns follow the standard WinMentor import structure.

salary.title: Payroll calculator (D112 core)
salary.banner2: (employer). The IT/construction/agriculture exemptions were removed (OUG 156/2024). The personal deduction is taken from the ANAF table. Full D112 (employees + XML export) is in progress.

aging.title: Aged balances
